source_pr.title: domain, executor: add the missing debug trace for manual plan replayer
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #44599 

Problem Summary:

A careless mistake during the development of the debug trace.

### What is changed and how it works?

- `DebugTrace` is changed to a slice.
- In `dumpExplain`, `OptimizerDebugTrace` is collected for every statement.
- In `dumpDebugTrace`, each `DebugTrace` is output to a single file.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. Exact plan/EXPLAIN assertions are brittle when optimizer choices can vary. This PR stabilizes it by: slices.Sort(filesInReplayer) (server/plan_replayer_test.go).

evidence: files: domain/plan_replayer.go, domain/plan_replayer_dump.go, executor/adapter.go, executor/executor_test.go, server/BUILD.bazel, server/plan_replayer_test.go
